howItWorks.intro: This beer priming sugar calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Sugar (g) = (Target CO2 - Residual CO2) × Batch Size (L) × 4
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much priming sugar for 5 gallons?
faq.answer: For a standard American ale (2.5 volumes CO2), about 4-5 oz of corn sugar for 5 gallons. Use less for English ales (1.8-2.2 vols) and more for Belgian styles (3.0-4.0 vols).
